title: Reimagining the mouse pointer with AI
summary: Google DeepMind has developed an AI-powered enhancement to the mouse pointer that enables it to understand not just what is being pointed at, but also the contextual relevance of that target. The system represents a significant evolution of a fundamental interface element that has remained largely unchanged for over fifty years.
